title: Deploy main → Clearfield + Founders
when: After a merge to main, or when Clearfield/Founders feel stale and you need current code.
description: Pull origin/main on both host clones and restart the app containers. Daily grab-and-go after merges. Diff-first if mid-agent-turn. Rebuild (image) only when requirements.lock changed.

steps.label: Diff-first (optional)
steps.command: ssh lphomebase@lp-homebase.mesh.lucidcove.org "cd /home/lphomebase/ClearfieldCove/cove-core && git fetch origin main && git log --oneline HEAD..origin/main | head -20 && echo '---' && cd ~/CoveCoveNew/lucid-cove-core && git fetch origin main && git log --oneline HEAD..origin/main | head -20"
steps.note: Shows commits about to land. Skip if you already know main is ahead and agents are between turns.

steps.label: RB16-DEPLOY — pull main + restart both
steps.command: ssh lphomebase@lp-homebase.mesh.lucidcove.org "cd ~/CoveCoveNew/lucid-cove-core && git pull --ff-only origin main && docker restart lucidcove-6f6f-app && cd /home/lphomebase/ClearfieldCove/cove-core && git pull --ff-only origin main && docker restart clearfield-app"
steps.note: Founders first, then Clearfield. Code is bind-mounted; restart is enough for pure code changes. Wait ~15s, then hard-refresh MCs.

steps.label: Clearfield only
steps.command: ssh lphomebase@lp-homebase.mesh.lucidcove.org "cd /home/lphomebase/ClearfieldCove/cove-core && git pull --ff-only origin main && docker restart clearfield-app"
steps.note: DEV loop — use while verifying on Clearfield before promoting Founders.

steps.label: Smoke — containers up
steps.note: Both should show Up shortly after restart.
